column3: Treasurer (tax lien cert. sale) + Sheriff online auction
column4: Treasurer: 451 W Third St, Dayton, OH 45422
column9: Treasurer sells liens in bundles to institutions; the PRE-SALE delinquent list is the lead source. Sheriff sales Fri 9am.
Delinquent List page. Online search parcel-by-parcel; bulk file likely needs records request. Strongest fresh list.

column3: City of Dayton - Division of Housing Inspection
column9: No bulk-export portal. Kettering & Trotwood handle own enforcement separately.

column3: City of Dayton - Housing Inspection (Structural Nuisance Database)
column9: Dayton keeps Structural Nuisance Database (~2,100+ props). Not one-click; request the database.
Free RISS search by name/doc-type/municipality. Record-by-record; ask about bulk feed.

column3: Recorder (IRS) + Clerk of Courts (state tax + judgment)
column4: Recorder 451 W Third St; Clerk 41 N Perry St, Dayton 45422
column9: SPLIT: IRS liens at Recorder; Ohio state tax + judgment liens at Clerk of Courts.

column3: City of Dayton - Water/Utility Customer Service
column9: Dayton shuts off ~20,000+ accounts/yr but no public list. Records request; may be restricted.

column3: Dayton Building Services; County Building Regs (unincorp.)
column9: Dayton online permit status query. Bulk extracts not self-serve. Suburbs issue own permits.

column3: Dayton Municipal Court - Clerk, Civil Division
column9: FED cases; aggregate by plaintiff for repeat filers. Covers Dayton city + some townships only.

column3: Ohio AG Collections (program); filed at Montgomery Recorder
column9: Estate-recovery liens filed at Recorder (RISS). Overlaps heavily with probate.
